use_cases: Opening modal dialogs for user profile editing in web applications
Creating form-based overlays with backdrop blur for settings management
Displaying interactive forms within a focused modal container
Implementing account settings interfaces in SaaS platforms
ai_summary: A React modal dialog component with backdrop blur effect for editing user profiles. Features a trigger button, centered overlay with form inputs for name and username, close functionality, and smooth fade-in animation. Clean minimalist design with shadow depth and accessible keyboard navigation support.
